mapper.sql: br.id, br.room_id, mr.room_name, br.user_id, su.username AS user_name, su.real_name AS real_name, br.meeting_title, br.start_time, br.end_time, br.attendee_count, br.remark, br.status, br.approver_id, br.approve_time, br.approve_remark, br.check_in_time, br.create_time
FROM booking_record br LEFT JOIN meeting_room mr ON br.room_id = mr.id LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON br.user_id = su.id
mapper.select:
SELECT
WHERE br.status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY br.create_time ASC

SELECT su.real_name AS username, COUNT(*) AS count FROM booking_record br LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON br.user_id = su.id WHERE br.create_time >= #{monthStart} GROUP BY br.user_id, su.real_name ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT mr.room_name AS roomName, COUNT(*) AS count FROM booking_record br LEFT JOIN meeting_room mr ON br.room_id = mr.id WHERE br.create_time >= #{monthStart} GROUP BY br.room_id, mr.room_name ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 5
